body.head: Iḷampūraṇar
body.p: iccūttiram eṉnutaliṟṟō veṉiṉ, ituvum oṭṭuc coṟkaṇṇē kiṭantatōr ilakkaṇam uṇarttutal nutaliṟṟu.
urai : aṟuvakait tokaiccollum eḻuvāy vēṟṟumai yiyalpām eṉṟu īṇṭu eytuvittār eṉpatu.
maṟṟu, oṭṭuc coṟkaḷai, 'orucol naṭaiyaṉa' eṉap pōnta ilēcu eṉṉai yeṉiṉ, avai pala coṉmaippaṭap poruḷicaiyā; orucol viḻukkāṭu paṭat tiraṇṭicaikkum eṉpatu karuttu.
aḵtiṉai, yāṉaikkōṭu vēṅkaippū eṉpaṉavaṟṟāṉ aṟika. kaṟcuṉaik kuvaḷaiyitaḻ eṉpatum atu. (24)

body.head: Cēṉāvaraiyar
body.p: (i-ḷ.) aṟuvakait tokaic collum orucollāy naṭattalaiyuṭaiya e-ṟu.

orucoṉṉaṭaiyaveṉap potuppaṭak kūṟiyavataṉāṉ, yāṉaik kōṭu, kolyāṉai eṉa muṉmoḻi peyarākiyavaḻi oru peyarc coṉṉaṭaiyavātalum, nilaṅkaṭantāṉ, kuṉṟattiruntāṉ eṉa muṉ moḻi viṉaiyāyavaḻi oruviṉaiccoṉṉaṭaiya vātaluṅ koḷka. avai urupēṟṟalum payaṉilaikōṭalu mutalākiya peyarttaṉmaiyum, payaṉilaiyātalum peyarkōṭalu mutalākiya viṉaittaṉmaiyu muṭaiya vātal avvac colloṭu kūṭṭik kaṇṭukoḷka.

nilaṅkaṭantāṉ, kuṉṟattiruntāṉ eṉap peyarum viṉaiyun tokkaṉa orucoṉṉīrmai yilavākaliṟ ṟokaiyeṉappaṭā veṉpāru muḷar. eḻuttōttiṉuḷ ‘peyarun toḻilum pirintoruṅ kicaippa-vēṟṟumaiyurupu nilaipeṟu vaḻiyun - tōṟṟam vēṇṭāt tokutik kaṇṇum' (eḻut. 132) eṉṟataṉāṉ, vēṟṟumaiyurupu tokap peyarun toḻilum oruṅkicaittal āciriyar nērntārākaliṉ, avai tokai yeṉavē paṭumeṉpatu. kaṭantāṉilam, iruntāṉ kuṉṟattu eṉpaṉa oruṅ kicaiyātu pakkicaittaliṉ, avai tokaiyaṉmaiyaṟika.

'ellāt tokaiyu morucoṉ ṉaṭaiya' eṉṟataṉāṉ, tokai yallāta toṭarmoḻiyuḷ orucoṉ ṉaṭaiyavāvaṉa cilavuḷaveṉpa tām. yāṉai kōṭu kūritu, irumpu poṉṉāyiṟṟu, makkaḷai uyar tiṇaiyeṉpa eṉpaṉavaṟṟuḷ, kōṭukūritu, poṉṉāyiṟṟu, uyar tiṇaiyeṉpa eṉṉun tokaiyal toṭarmoḻi oru coṉṉaṭaiya vāy eḻuvāykkum iraṇṭāvataṟkum muṭivāyiṉavāṟu kaṇṭukoḷka. piṟavumaṉṉa. (24)
